before.description: Prevent email addresses and personal data from entering the codebase. Use when user asks to 'prevent emails', 'remove personal data', 'privacy check', 'no email', or when writing/ editing any code, config, or documentation files.

after.description: Prevent email addresses and personal data from entering the codebase. Use this skill when the user asks to prevent emails, remove personal data, run a privacy check, scan for PII, or ensure no email addresses leak into source code or documentation — even if they just say 'no email' or 'check for personal data'. Not for security audits (use security-code-auditor), EU AI Act compliance (use eu-ai-act-compliance), or hardcoded secrets (use security-code-auditor).

key_changes: Added 'even if they' pushy trigger language
Added negative triggers: 'Not for security audits', 'EU AI Act compliance', 'hardcoded secrets'
Broadened trigger list: 'scan for PII', 'ensure no email addresses leak'
Removed restrictive 'when writing/editing any code' (too broad)
